bio: I have a strong interest in digital media, technology, and creative visual storytelling. Experienced in media editing, content management, event documentation, and social media management with a clean and detail-oriented approach.

slides.title: MAN 2 Kota Cirebon
slides.subtitle: Multimedia Major
slides.desc: Studying at MAN 2 Kota Cirebon with a focus on Multimedia. The curriculum covers video production, graphic design, digital photography, and media management — building a strong technical and creative foundation.

slides.title: OSIS — Ketua Jurnalistik & Broadcasting
slides.subtitle: Student Council · MAN 2 Kota Cirebon
slides.desc: Serving as Chairman of Journalism & Broadcasting within the Student Council for the 2025/2026 period. Responsible for coordinating media coverage of school events, managing the documentation team, and producing broadcast content.

slides.title: Kepala Divisi Multimedia — OSIS
slides.subtitle: Head of Multimedia Division · Student Council
slides.desc: Leading the Multimedia Division of the Student Council. Overseeing all visual and digital output: photography, video editing, motion graphics, and social media content for the school organisation.

slides.title: MEA Ecosystem
slides.subtitle: Platform · Founder & Builder
slides.desc: MEA Ecosystem is a personal digital platform I am building and actively developing — an integrated ecosystem of web-based services under a single identity. The platform currently includes Tools, an AI-powered Assistant, a Playlist service, and a Gallery, all hosted under the evanalmunawar.my.id domain family.

slides.title: MEA Tools
slides.subtitle: tools.evanalmunawar.my.id
slides.desc: A collection of useful web-based tools built and maintained as part of the MEA Ecosystem. Designed to be lightweight, fast, and accessible — solving real day-to-day needs without requiring any app installation.

slides.title: MEA Assistant
slides.subtitle: assistant.evanalmunawar.my.id
slides.desc: An AI-powered assistant interface integrated into the MEA Ecosystem, providing conversational and creative support. Built as a subdomain service connecting users to intelligent assistance within the platform.
